CustomField.formula: IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'NA Strategic'), 'NA Strategic', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'NA Enterprise'), 'NA Enterprise', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'NA Inside Sales'), 'NA Inside Sales', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'LATAM Inside Sales'), 'Resellers Americas', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'EMEA Inside Sales'), 'EMEA Inside Sales', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'Agencies Independent EMEA'), 'EMEA Inside Sales', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'Investors'), 'Investors', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'Japan Strategic'), 'Japan Strategic', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'Japan'), 'APAC Japan', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'Agencies Strategic'), 'Agencies Strategic', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'APAC Strategic'), 'APAC Strategic', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'APAC China'), 'APAC China', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'APAC Inside Sales'), 'APAC Inside Sales', IF( CONTAINS(Sub_Division__c, 'OEM'), 'OEM', CASE (Sub_Division__c, 'UK Enterprise','EMEA Enterprise', 'Dach Enterprise','EMEA Enterprise', 'France Enterprise','EMEA Enterprise', 'EMEA Strategic','EMEA Strategic', 'Reseller - ANZ-Trellian','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - SEA-Maestros','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - India - Altudo','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - Brazil - 108','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Mexico - Hexagon Data','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Brazil - Alpha','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Turkey-CloudyFlex','Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Italy - Nubo','Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Colombia - Indices', 'Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Malaysia-LaunchPad', 'Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - Vietnam - AMS JSC', 'Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - China - TrueMetrics', 'Resellers APAC', 'Resellers - UAE - BrentFord Technical Services', 'Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Spain - Cartagon', 'Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Australia and Pacific Islands - Bring Performance','Resellers APAC', 'Consultancies Strategic','Consultancies Strategic', 'Raw Data','Raw Data', null) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: ROE Division
